title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 12
raw_text:
Beyond 1974, he endured voices, visions, and prophetic dreams too
numerous to list here—all to be enfolded, by the writer, into the cascade of
interpretation of those earlier events. A reader will learn how readily and
fluently a new revelation transforms Dick's sense of the "core facts" of 2-3-
74, which never sit still but adapt to a flux of analysis, paraphrase, and doubt.
Illuminating them fully was Dick's subsequent lifework. Why should it be
simple for us?
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
